     The Numbers Business Report

Firestarter (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $9,739,250Details
International Box Office $5,290,994
Worldwide Box Office $15,030,244
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $517,097
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $34,133
Total $551,230
Further financial details...

Synopsis

For more than a decade, parents Andy and Vicky have been on the run, desperate to hide their daughter Charlie from a shadowy federal agency that wants to harness her unprecedented gift for creating fire into a weapon of mass destruction. Andy has taught Charlie how to defuse her power, which is triggered by anger or pain. But as Charlie turns 11, the fire becomes harder and harder to control. After an incident reveals the family’s location, a mysterious operative is deployed to hunt down the family and seize Charlie once and for all. Charlie has other plans.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,827,715 (39.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.54 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:64.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,412 opening theaters/3,413 max. theaters, 2.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $11,061,864

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 13th, 2022 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: May 19th, 2020 (Wide), released as Llamas De Venganza (Central America)
May 11th, 2022 (Wide) (Egypt)
May 12th, 2022 (Wide), released as Podpaľačka (Slovakia)
May 12th, 2022 (Wide) (Germany)
May 12th, 2022 (Wide) (Austria)
Video Release: May 13th, 2022 by Peacock
MPA Rating: R for violent content.
(Rating bulletin 2714 (cert #53574), 1/12/2022)
Running Time: 94 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Fugitive / On the Run, Human Experimentation, Psychics, Scientific Experiment Gone Awry
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Blumhouse, Weed Road Pictures, BoulderLight Pictures, Angry Adam, Universal Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

For more than a decade, parents Andy and Vicky have been on the run, desperate to hide their daughter Charlie from a shadowy federal agency that wants to harness her unprecedented gift for creating fire into a weapon of mass destruction. Andy has taught Charlie how to defuse her power, which is triggered by anger or pain. But as Charlie turns 11, the fire becomes harder and harder to control. After an incident reveals the family’s location, a mysterious operative is deployed to hunt down the family and seize Charlie once and for all. Charlie has other plans.
